init._comment: Principle/variation showcase: a 16-step STEP PITCH melody. MELODY sweeps right into GROW, back to LOOP, left into RENEW, a new_phrase tap, then a PRINCIPLE change with its own new_phrase.
Part B silenced: default lanes would otherwise siren its pitch (PITCH/LEVEL targets are active by boot default).

events._comment: 6s: sweep MELODY right - GROW mutates the loop in walk-sized steps.
14s: back to LOOP - freeze whatever remains.
20s: sweep MELODY left - RENEW erodes the melody toward the root.
30s: tap new_phrase - audition a fresh phrase at the next STEP-mode wrap.
34s: cycle to a different PRINCIPLE, then tap new_phrase again to hear it.
